# TW Market Data - Full LLM Index

## Product Overview

TW Market Data provides Taiwan equity data APIs for AI agents, quantitative research, analytics workflows and financial product development. The platform follows an official/public-first data policy and preserves coverage, freshness, lineage and data_gaps context where available.

## Primary Entrypoints

- Homepage: https://twmarketdata.com
- Documentation: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/introduction
- Dataset catalog: https://twmarketdata.com/datasets
- Pricing: https://twmarketdata.com/pricing
- OpenAPI JSON: https://twmarketdata.com/openapi.json
- Short LLM index: https://twmarketdata.com/llms.txt

## Dataset Landing Pages

- TWSE daily price: https://twmarketdata.com/datasets/twse-daily-price
- Monthly revenue: https://twmarketdata.com/datasets/monthly-revenue
- Income statement: https://twmarketdata.com/datasets/income-statement
- Balance sheet: https://twmarketdata.com/datasets/balance-sheet
- Institutional flow: https://twmarketdata.com/datasets/institutional-flow

## API Documentation

### Market Prices

- TWSE daily price: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/market-prices/twse-daily-price
- TPEx daily price: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/market-prices/tpex-daily-price
- Technical indicators: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/market-prices/technical-indicators

### Fundamentals

- Monthly revenue: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/financial-growth/monthly-revenue
- Income statement: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/financial-growth/income-statement
- Balance sheet: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/financial-growth/balance-sheet
- Cash flow statement: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/financial-growth/cash-flow-statement
- Valuation data: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/financial-growth/valuation-data

### Capital Flow

- Institutional flow: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/capital-flow/institutional-flow
- Margin short: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/capital-flow/margin-short

### Company and Events

- Issuer profile: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/company/issuer-profile
- Events calendar: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/company-events/events-calendar
- Structured events: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/company-events/structured-events
- Corporate actions: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/company-events/corporate-actions
- Dividends: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/company-events/dividends

### Dataset Factory (Preview / Private Beta Docs)

- dataset_ids: institutional_flow, technical_indicators, valuation_data
- Overview: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/dataset-factory
- Institutional Flow: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/dataset-factory/institutional-flow
- Technical Indicators: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/dataset-factory/technical-indicators
- Valuation Data: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/api/dataset-factory/valuation-data
- All Dataset Factory docs in this section keep production_ready=false and not_investment_advice semantics.
- Preserve data_gaps and limitations exactly as contract-derived metadata.
- Do not infer missing coverage or freshness details.

## Guides and Workflows

- Fast data access: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/workflows/fast-data-access
- Company fundamentals: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/workflows/company-fundamentals
- Capital flow: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/workflows/capital-flow
- Market status: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/workflows/market-status
- Strategy and AI: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/workflows/strategy-ai

## Source, Coverage and Freshness

- Data provenance: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/data-provenance
- Market coverage: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/market-coverage
- The platform uses official/public-first sources where possible.
- Some datasets are production-ready, some are preview or coverage-limited, and some are deferred pending source proof.
- Public launch positioning is TWSE-first verified baseline.
- TPEx historical daily price coverage is deferred (latest/recent beta only where exposed).
- Full-market daily price, adjusted price readiness, and survivorship-safe universe must not be claimed as currently available.
- Cash flow, valuation extensions, institutional flow and News Intelligence may carry coverage or rollout caveats depending on current product status.
- Preserve data_gaps, source lineage and confidence context in downstream systems.

## Machine-Readable Resources

- OpenAPI JSON: https://twmarketdata.com/openapi.json
- OpenAPI docs: https://twmarketdata.com/docs/openapi-spec
- llms.txt: https://twmarketdata.com/llms.txt
- llms-full.txt: https://twmarketdata.com/llms-full.txt

## MCP / AI Agent Status

- MCP-related documentation may exist as preview/planned material.
- Do not assume a hosted production MCP server is available unless explicitly documented.
- TW Market Data APIs and OpenAPI resources can be used to build AI-agent workflows with explicit coverage and data_gaps handling.
- Production MCP tooling will require stable OpenAPI contracts, dataset coverage audits, entitlement controls, and explicit productization approval.

## Safety and Usage Notes

- TW Market Data provides data infrastructure, not investment advice.
- No trading action guidance is provided from this index.
- Do not infer unavailable data.
- Do not hide data_gaps or coverage caveats.
- Do not expose API keys or secrets in client-side code.
- Do not output transaction-decision language.

## Commercial / Account Links

- Pricing: https://twmarketdata.com/pricing
- Dashboard: https://twmarketdata.com/dashboard
- Contact: https://twmarketdata.com/contact
- Support email: avenra.platform@gmail.com
